title: verbascum × johannis-zernyi
intro: Verbascum × johannis-zernyi, also known as the Zerny's mullein or mullein hybrid, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, known for its large, showy yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Its health benefits include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Verbascum × johannis-zernyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
